summary: Implementation plan to add Google Search Grounding verification to the Prompt_Image pipeline. Covers: adding call_gemini_native to api_client.py, creating historical_verifier.py module with verify_bible_google() function, creating gemini_keys.json config, modifying process_controller.py pipeline to insert verification after bible generation but before prompt generation, and adding Google Check checkbox to config_section.py UI. The verification uses Gemini API + Google Search to fact-check uniforms, weapons, banners, architecture against real historical records for the specific era depicted in the SRT content.
